{{Infobox artifact
| name = White Sun medallion
| introduced = ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Andel]]’s [[White Sun medallion]] helped them get through the [[arena]] guards.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Andel]] clutches a [[White Sun medallion]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c21">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[White Sun medallion]] is a silver sun with a white [[diamond]] at its heart and pulses with [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[White Sun medallion]] is an item held by [[Andel]] that was glowing.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
